properties.address: Largie Road Insch, Insch, Aberdeenshire AB52 6LT
properties.description: Here's a revised version incorporating those points: Bennachie Leisure Centre Community Café is a welcoming warm space that is open all year round, providing a friendly and inclusive environment for everyone. It offers affordable refreshments, a place to socialise, and opportunities to reduce loneliness while building community connections. Alongside the café, visitors can improve their health and wellbeing through access to the gym and a wide range of activity classes suitable for all ages and abilities. Whether people come for exercise, conversation, or simply somewhere comfortable to spend time, the centre promotes physical health, mental wellbeing, friendship, and a strong sense of community throughout the year.
properties.title: Bennachie Leisure Centre

properties.address: Bennachie Leisure Centre, Insch, Aberdeenshire AB52 6LT
